positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of a cosmic forest and mythical forest creatures. The scene features giant, bioluminescent mushrooms with swirling nebula patterns, intertwined with stylized silhouettes of woodland spirits, celestial deer, and fantastical fauna. The primary color palette is deep midnight blues, vibrant cosmic purples, emerald greens, and luminous electric teal accents. Use a high-contrast, graphic novel aesthetic combined with intricate etching details. The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for wrapping around a garment, with crisp lines and strong visual impact. Studio quality, vibrant pop art feel, high detail, vector art influence.
